workplan: Build Agent 6: Notification dispatch. Generate bilingual push/SMS notifications for both user (customer) and provider, save to Firestore notifications collection.
tasks_completed: Created notification_agent with separate user and provider message templates
send_notifications() generates both notification types in single LLM call
Saves each notification to Firestore via firebase_client.create_notification()
SMS text capped at 160 chars as per GSM standard
Code-switching English+Roman Urdu for authentic Pakistani communication style
decisions_made: Single LLM call generates both user and provider notifications (efficiency)
Separate Firestore documents per notification with recipient_type field
SMS versions generated alongside push for multi-channel delivery
outcome: 2 notifications (user + provider) saved to Firestore for booking BK2026051710151566D0.
